info.title: Hootsuite Platform API
info.description: The Hootsuite Platform API allows developers to build integrations with the Hootsuite social media management platform. It provides access to user profiles, social media scheduling, media management, team and member administration, and analytics.

get.description: Returns details about the currently authenticated user.
Returns a list of organizations the authenticated user belongs to.
Returns a list of social profiles accessible by the authenticated user.
Returns a list of social profiles for the organization. Supports pagination via cursor.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

get.description: Returns details about a specific social profile by its ID.

parameters.name: socialProfileId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the social profile.

get.summary: List teams for a social profile
get.description: Returns the teams that have access to a specific social profile.

parameters.name: socialProfileId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the social profile.

post.description: Creates and schedules a new social media message to be posted to one or more social profiles.

get.description: Returns a list of scheduled messages. Supports filtering by state and time range.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Filter messages scheduled after this time (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: Filter messages scheduled before this time (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by message state.

parameters.name: socialProfileIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of social profile IDs to filter by.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

get.description: Returns details about a specific scheduled message.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the message.

delete.description: Deletes a scheduled message. Only messages in SCHEDULED or DRAFT state can be deleted.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the message.

get.description: Returns the approval history for a specific message, including reviewer actions and comments.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the message.

post.description: Approves a message that is pending approval. The message will then be scheduled for publishing.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the message.

post.description: Rejects a message that is pending approval, with an optional reason.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the message.

post.description: Uploads a media file (image or video) that can be attached to messages. Returns a media ID and upload URL.

get.description: Returns the status and details of a media upload.

parameters.name: mediaId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the media upload.

get.description: Returns a list of members in the organization.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: The organization ID to list members for.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

post.description: Adds a new member to the organization.

get.description: Returns details about a specific organization member.

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the member.

delete.description: Removes a member from the organization.

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the member.

get.description: Returns the teams that a specific member belongs to.

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the member.

get.description: Returns a list of teams in the organization.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: The organization ID to list teams for.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

post.description: Creates a new team in the organization.

get.description: Returns details about a specific team.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team.

delete.description: Deletes a team from the organization.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team.

get.description: Returns a list of members belonging to a specific team.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team.

put.summary: Add a member to a team
put.description: Adds an existing organization member to a team.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team.

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the member.

delete.summary: Remove a member from a team
delete.description: Removes a member from a team.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team.

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the member.

get.summary: List social profiles for a team
get.description: Returns the social profiles assigned to a specific team.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team.

put.summary: Add a social profile to a team
put.description: Assigns a social profile to a team, granting team members access to it.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team.

parameters.name: socialProfileId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the social profile.

204.description: Social profile added to team successfully

404.description: Team or social profile not found

delete.summary: Remove a social profile from a team
delete.description: Removes a social profile from a team.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the team.

parameters.name: socialProfileId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the social profile.

204.description: Social profile removed from team successfully

404.description: Team or social profile not found

get.description: Returns details about a specific organization.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

get.description: Returns a list of members belonging to a specific organization.

parameters.name: organizationId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for fetching the next page of results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return per page.

post.description: Exchanges an authorization code or refresh token for an access token.

400.description: Bad request - invalid grant or parameters

get.description: Redirects the user to the Hootsuite authorization page to grant access to the application. This is the initial step of the OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow.

parameters.name: response_type
parameters.description: Must be set to 'code' for authorization code flow.

parameters.name: client_id
parameters.description: The client ID of your application.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: The redirect URI registered with your application.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Space-separated list of scopes requested.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: An opaque value used by the client to maintain state between the request and callback.

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow for authenticating with the Hootsuite Platform API.

scopes.offline: Access to refresh tokens for long-lived sessions

field.description: The field that caused the error, if applicable.

cursor.description: Cursor for fetching the next page of results. Null if no more pages.

id.description: The unique identifier for the user.

createdAt.description: The date and time the user account was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the organization.

billingEmail.description: The billing email for the organization.

planName.description: The name of the subscription plan.

createdAt.description: The date and time the organization was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the social profile.

socialNetworkId.description: The ID of the profile on the social network.

socialNetworkUsername.description: The username on the social network.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the profile's avatar image.

ownerId.description: The ID of the Hootsuite user who owns this social profile.

organizationId.description: The ID of the organization this profile belongs to.

createdAt.description: The date and time the social profile was added.

text.description: The text content of the message.

socialProfileIds.description: The IDs of the social profiles to post to.

scheduledSendTime.description: The date and time to publish the message (ISO 8601 format). If not provided, the message is sent immediately.

webhookUrls.description: Webhook URLs to be notified when the message is published.

tags.description: Tags to categorize the message for tracking.

emailNotification.description: Whether to send an email notification when the message is published.

id.description: The media ID from a previously uploaded media file.

url.description: A publicly accessible URL to the media file.

MessageTargeting.description: Targeting settings for the message (Facebook only).

MessagePrivacy.description: Privacy settings for the message (Facebook only).

value.description: The privacy level of the post.

id.description: The unique identifier for the message.

state.description: The current state of the message.

text.description: The text content of the message.

socialProfileIds.description: The IDs of the social profiles this message was posted to.

scheduledSendTime.description: The scheduled publish date and time.

postUrl.description: The URL of the published post on the social network (available after publishing).

postId.description: The ID of the post on the social network (available after publishing).

createdByMemberId.description: The ID of the member who created the message.

createdAt.description: The date and time the message was created.

reviewedByMemberId.description: The ID of the member who reviewed the message.

reviewedAt.description: The date and time the message was reviewed.

action.description: The action taken on the message.

memberId.description: The ID of the member who performed the action.

memberName.description: The name of the member who performed the action.

comment.description: Optional comment associated with the action.

timestamp.description: The date and time the action was performed.

comment.description: An optional comment explaining the approval or rejection.

sizeBytes.description: The size of the media file in bytes.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the media file.

id.description: The unique identifier for the media upload.

uploadUrl.description: The presigned URL to upload the media file to.

uploadUrlDurationSeconds.description: The number of seconds the upload URL is valid for.

id.description: The unique identifier for the media.

state.description: The current state of the media upload.

mimeType.description: The MIME type of the media file.

sizeBytes.description: The size of the media file in bytes.

url.description: The URL of the processed media file.

thumbnailUrl.description: A thumbnail URL for the media file.

downloadUrl.description: A URL to download the media file.

createdAt.description: The date and time the media was uploaded.

id.description: The unique identifier for the member.

role.description: The member's role in the organization.

organizationId.description: The ID of the organization the member belongs to.

teamIds.description: The IDs of teams the member belongs to.

socialProfileIds.description: The IDs of social profiles the member has access to.

isActive.description: Whether the member's account is active.

createdAt.description: The date and time the member was added.

organizationId.description: The organization to add the member to.

email.description: The email address of the member to add.

fullName.description: The full name of the member.

role.description: The role to assign to the member.

teamIds.description: Team IDs to assign the member to.

id.description: The unique identifier for the team.

organizationId.description: The ID of the organization this team belongs to.

memberIds.description: The IDs of members in this team.

socialProfileIds.description: The IDs of social profiles assigned to this team.

teamPermissions.description: The permissions granted to team members.

createdAt.description: The date and time the team was created.

organizationId.description: The organization to create the team in.

memberIds.description: IDs of members to add to the team.

socialProfileIds.description: IDs of social profiles to assign to the team.

teamPermissions.description: Permissions to grant to the team.

name.description: The updated name of the team.

socialProfileIds.description: Updated list of social profile IDs.

grant_type.description: The type of grant being exchanged.

code.description: The authorization code received from the authorization endpoint (required for authorization_code grant type).

redirect_uri.description: The redirect URI used in the authorization request (required for authorization_code grant type).

refresh_token.description: The refresh token (required for refresh_token grant type).

client_id.description: The client ID of the application.

client_secret.description: The client secret of the application.

access_token.description: The access token to use for API requests.

expires_in.description: The number of seconds until the access token expires.

refresh_token.description: The refresh token to use for obtaining new access tokens.

scope.description: The scopes granted to the access token.

tags.description: Upload and manage media attachments for messages
